name: droidbridge
description: Premium Mac ↔ Android file transfer app

scripts.start: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('node_modules')) { console.log('node_modules not found, auto-installing dependencies...'); require('child_process').execSync('npm install', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }" && npx electron .
scripts.package: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('node_modules/electron-packager')) { console.log('electron-packager not found, installing dependencies...'); require('child_process').execSync('npm install', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }" && node build-mac-icon.js && electron-packager . DroidBridge --platform=darwin --overwrite --icon=icon.icns

author: DroidBridge
